category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfplugingen-openapi as OpenAPI to Terraform provider code generation specification tooling.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the executable; source_facts.homepage points to the official HashiCorp project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official HashiCorp GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-codegen-openapi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions OpenAPI to Terraform Provider code generation; current_curation.tags includes cli.
